race.description: Quayclean C S Hayes Memorial Cup (L)
race.comment: MISS ARIA (4) chases the elusive black type win but has always held so much promise. Lightly raced at the mile but she's always suggested she would thrive at the trip. Has tackled the line nicely behind them in two runs back and should be peaking now. Clark booked from the inside alley could be the masterstroke. She's ready to deliver. VERDAD (5) is perennial place-getter but there's little doubting his ability. Gets in really well at the weights and has the blinkers applied first time off a month between runs. Expect him to be fighting out the finish once more. AIR ASSAULT (1) returns to his home state after contesting strong group races over the borer. Is as tough as they come and will appreciate reuniting with his mate Holder, who knows him so well. Sure to be very competitive. BAMYAN BUDDHA (3) won't know himself at this weight and deserves his crack back a this level. Loves the mile and is tough as they come. Don't dismiss. ARRAN BAY (2) will also be better third-up to the mile.
